raw_text_excerpt:
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 31
Date 27 June 2026
Time 18:08
Title Infringement - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed AUT DOC 31 - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times.pdf
Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 31 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  27 June 2026 
 
        Time  18:08 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1 and 3. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 3 44  Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 16:31:44 PIT 
2 1 43  Franco Colapinto BWT Alpine F1 Team 16:39:18 PIT 
 
 
Infringement Breach of Appendix L Chapter IV Article 2 c) of the FIA International Sporting Code and Article 
B1.8.6 of the FIA F1 Regulations. 
  
Decision Deletion of the lap times shown in accordance with Article 12.4.1.e of the FIA International 
Sporting Code.
